opinion.h: BROUGHTON v. OHIO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 554. Decided June 19, 1961.
opinion.p: Jack G. Day filed a brief for Ohio Civil Liberties Union, as amicus curiae, in support of appellant.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
367 U.S. 905 WEISBERG v. OHIO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 808. Decided June 19, 1961.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
